arduinoota_config_auto.tooltip: Start WiFi OTA on the currently connected WiFi and add polling automatically

arduinoota_begin.tooltip: Start WiFi OTA on the currently connected WiFi with internal flash storage; polling must be called in loop

arduinoota_begin_advanced.message0: advanced initialize WiFi OTA network %1 storage %2 discovery %3 name %4 password %5
arduinoota_begin_advanced.tooltip: Start WiFi OTA with the selected network library, storage object, and mDNS discovery mode after the network is connected

arduinoota_poll.tooltip: Call repeatedly in loop to process WiFi OTA upload requests

arduinoota_handle.tooltip: Process WiFi OTA update requests; equivalent to poll()

arduinoota_end.tooltip: Stop the WiFi OTA listener and mDNS port response

arduinoota_on_start.tooltip: Run when a WiFi OTA upload request starts

arduinoota_before_apply.tooltip: Run after firmware upload completes and before the update is applied

arduinoota_on_error.message0: when WiFi OTA error code variable %1 message variable %2
arduinoota_on_error.tooltip: Run when an OTA request fails; code is an HTTP status code and message is the status text
